sentences.text: Hi, you've reached the rush companies our office hours are Monday through Friday eight AM to five PM. However your call is very important to us. Please listen carefully for menu options. If you've reached at my draft business hours. If you are a tenant of a multi, family community, please contact Edison forty seven at two five three seven six one four seven four seven, if you are a tenant of a single family home with a maintenance emergency, please hang up and dial two five three two two five four four seven six, if you are a commercial tenant with the maintenance emergency, please dial one and your call be connected. If this is not an emergency and you like to leave a general voicemail, you may dial zero now or if you know the extension of the person you are trying to reach you may dial it at any time for a company directory dial two for general company. Using the telephone keypad. Please begin spelling. The first or last name of the person you wish to call to listen to these choices again press Star to return to the dialing alina, Nelson, extension two forty four. The person you are calling is unavailable. Please leave a message after the tone. When you have finished recording hang up or press pound for more options.

conversation.title: Call: Alyssa Tillich and Alena McClain @ The Rush Companies
